msg: Reading story-001-pipeline-status-dashboard.md and codebase to produce plan
Identified 3 files to change: src/types.ts, src/panels/BuilderPanel.ts, src/extension.ts
Plan complete — no polling; watcher-driven refresh; log entries bundled into init message
Designing step-card status indicators, spinner, elapsed-time, and log-strip UI
CSS plan: .step-in_progress border-teal+spinner, .step-done border-green, .step-failed border-red; .wf-active-log strip; progress label
Writing 5 acceptance test scenarios from story ACs

AC1: board watcher fires → renderWorkflows re-runs → step status updates without polling. AC2: in_progress step → spinner + latest log. AC3: done step → green check + elapsed. AC4: failed step → red X + output. AC5: all done → bar at 100%
Test plan written, compile check is the automated gate
Implementing: types.ts (started_at/completed_at), BuilderPanel.ts (logs in sendAllData + renderWorkflows overhaul), extension.ts (onLogChange → BuilderPanel.refreshAll)
Implementation complete — 3 files changed, 0 new files created
Reviewing diff against all 5 story acceptance criteria
PASS: AC1 watcher-driven ✓, AC2 spinner+log ✓, AC3 green check+elapsed ✓, AC4 red X ✓, AC5 100% bar ✓. No regressions in other tabs.
npm run compile: exit 0, zero TypeScript errors
Watcher chain verified — BuilderPanel.refreshAll fires on both .task-board.json and .agent-log.jsonl changes (extension.ts lines 34 and 40)
story-001 COMPLETE — files changed: src/types.ts, src/panels/BuilderPanel.ts, src/extension.ts, .task-board.json, .agent-log.jsonl. Compile: 0 errors. All ACs satisfied.
